info.title: Oshkelosh
info.description:
# Oshkelosh API

Modular e-commerce backend: core REST API plus **pluggable addons** for suppliers,
payments, notifications, and storefront frontends.

## Documentation (repository paths)

| Topic | Path |
|-------|------|
| Documentation index | `docs/README.md` |
| All plugins (overview) | `app/addons/README.md` |
| Storefront / SPA development | `app/addons/frontends/README.md` |
| Payment processors | `app/addons/payments/README.md` |
| Suppliers / fulfillment | `app/addons/suppliers/README.md` |
| Email / notifications | `app/addons/notifications/README.md` |
| OpenAPI reference | `docs/api/OPENAPI.md` |

## Authentication

Most customer endpoints require:

```
Authorization: Bearer <access_token>
```

Obtain tokens via `POST /api/v1/auth/login` or `POST /api/v1/auth/register`
(register returns a JWT session plus the user profile). Email verification is
optional after signup and never blocks shopping.

Admin JSON endpoints require a user with `is_admin=true`.

## Storefront SPA contract

1. Load branding: `GET /api/v1/storefront/config`
2. Optional early CSS: `GET /api/v1/storefront/theme.css`
3. Use core APIs for catalog, cart, orders, checkout

## Addon routes

Addon paths follow:

- **API:** `/api/v1/{category}s/{addon_id}/...` (example: `/api/v1/payments/stripe/checkout`)
- **Admin HTML:** `/admin/{category}s/{addon_id}/...` (configure credentials and options)

Enable and configure addons in the admin panel under Suppliers, Payments, Frontends, or Tools.

post.description: Create a customer account with shipping and billing addresses. Returns a JWT session immediately. Email verification is optional and does not block login or shopping.
Authenticate with email and password. Returns a JWT access token and refresh token.
Invalidate the current access token. The client should discard stored tokens.

schema.title: Response Logout Api V1 Auth Logout Post

get.description: Return the profile of the currently authenticated user.

patch.description: Update profile fields for the authenticated user.

get.description: Confirm email ownership using the token from the verification email.

post.description: Confirm email ownership using the token from the verification email.
Send a new email verification link to the authenticated user. No-op success if the account is already verified.
Send a password reset link if the account exists.
Set a new password using a valid reset token.
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token pair.

get.description: Return a paginated list of published products. Supports filtering by category_id or category slug, search (name/description), status, and sorting.

schema.title: Response List Products Api V1 Products Get

get.description: Return the full detail of a single published product by URL slug.
Return the full detail of a single published product.
Return all images associated with a product.

schema.title: Response List Product Images Api V1 Products  Product Id  Images Get

get.description: Return categories in a hierarchical tree structure.

schema.title: Response List Categories Api V1 Categories Get

get.description: Return the detail of a single category with its children.
Return the current user's shopping cart with computed totals.

schema.title: Response Get Cart Api V1 Cart Get

post.description: Return estimated tax and shipping for the current cart using Site Settings rules, optional supplier shipping quotes, and any enabled tax tool addon.
Add a product to the current user's cart. Creates or updates an existing line item.

delete.description: Remove all items from the current user's cart.

schema.title: Response Clear Cart Api V1 Cart Items Delete

patch.description: Update the quantity of a cart item.

delete.description: Remove a single item from the cart.

schema.title: Response Remove Item Api V1 Cart Items  Item Id  Delete

post.description: Create a new order from the current user's cart. Inventory is reserved immediately; stale pending orders can be cleaned up by background maintenance jobs.

get.description: Return a paginated list of the current user's orders.

schema.title: Response List Orders Api V1 Orders Get

post.description: Start checkout with the enabled payment processor for a pending order.

schema.title: Response Checkout Order Api V1 Orders  Order Id  Checkout Post

get.description: Return the full detail of a single order belonging to the current user.

post.description: Cancel a pending order owned by the current user.
Upload an image to configured storage (local disk or R2). Allowed types: jpg, png, webp, gif (max 5 MB).

schema.title: Response Upload Image Api V1 Media Upload Post

get.description: Return a URL to access stored media (presigned for R2, direct for local).

schema.title: Response Get Media Url Api V1 Media  Key  Get

delete.description: Delete a media file from storage. Admin only.

schema.title: Response Delete Media Api V1 Media  Key  Delete

get.description:
Returns merged configuration for the active storefront SPA:

- **`site`**: Site-wide branding from **Admin → Site Settings** (name, colors, fonts, logo).
- **`frontend`**: Active frontend addon id, version, and frontend-specific `config`.

Every storefront must call this on startup. See `app/addons/frontends/README.md`
for integration details and CSS variable names.

Returns a small CSS file defining `:root` custom properties from site settings.

Link from `index.html` for early paint before JavaScript runs:

```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/api/v1/storefront/theme.css" />
```

Variables: `--color-primary`, `--color-secondary`, `--font-sans`.

Returns a generated service worker for FCM web push when the FCM notification
addon is enabled. Register from the storefront with scope at site root.

post.description: Process stale carts and send abandoned-cart reminders (cron entrypoint).

post.summary: Admin Run Pending Order Cleanup Job
post.description: Cancel stale pending orders and restore reserved inventory.

config.title: Config
config.description: Frontend-specific settings from the addon's Pydantic config_schema. Shape varies per frontend; see that addon's README.

ActiveFrontendInfo.title: ActiveFrontendInfo
ActiveFrontendInfo.description: Metadata and config for the currently enabled frontend addon.

country.title: Country
country.description: ISO-3166-1 alpha-2 country code (aliases like 'USA' accepted).

Address.title: Address
Address.description: Postal address used for shipping and billing.

sso_providers.title: Sso Providers
sso_providers.description: Enabled social sign-in providers (empty when SSO addon is off).

email_verification_enabled.title: Email Verification Enabled
email_verification_enabled.description: When true, the shop sends verification emails after registration. Verification is optional and never blocks shopping.

product_id.title: Product Id
product_id.description: Optional product ID to associate with

CartQuoteRequest.title: CartQuoteRequest
CartQuoteRequest.description: Optional shipping address for checkout tax/shipping preview.

CartQuoteResponse.title: CartQuoteResponse
CartQuoteResponse.description: Estimated tax and shipping for the current cart.

MessageResponse.title: MessageResponse
MessageResponse.description: A minimal JSON response carrying only a message.

push.description: Enabled push provider and client config, or null when push is off.

NotificationsConfigPublic.title: NotificationsConfigPublic
NotificationsConfigPublic.description: Notification options exposed to the storefront.

OrderCreateFromCart.title: OrderCreateFromCart
OrderCreateFromCart.description: Storefront order creation from the authenticated user's cart.

total_cents.title: Total Cents
total_cents.description: Grand total in cents (merchandise + tax + shipping).

total.title: Total
total.description: Grand total as decimal (merchandise + tax + shipping).

subtotal_cents.title: Subtotal Cents
subtotal_cents.description: Merchandise subtotal in cents (sum of line items).

compare_at_price.title: Compare At Price
compare_at_price.description: Compare-at price in standard currency units

popularity_score.title: Popularity Score
popularity_score.description: units_sold divided by days since created_at (min 1 day)

config.title: Config
config.description: Provider-specific public client config for browser SDK initialization.

PushConfigPublic.title: PushConfigPublic
PushConfigPublic.description: Public web push client configuration (no secrets).

RegisterResponse.title: RegisterResponse
RegisterResponse.description: Registration result: profile plus JWT session.

password.title: Password
password.description: Plaintext password – it will be hashed server-side.

store_name.title: Store Name
store_name.description: Display name shown in title, header, and emails.

primary_color.title: Primary Color
primary_color.description: Primary brand color (hex). Mapped to CSS `--color-primary`.

secondary_color.title: Secondary Color
secondary_color.description: Secondary brand color (hex). Mapped to CSS `--color-secondary`.

font_family.title: Font Family
font_family.description: CSS font-family stack. Mapped to CSS `--font-sans`.

meta_description.title: Meta Description
meta_description.description: Default HTML meta description for SEO.

site_url.title: Site Url
site_url.description: Resolved public storefront URL (from PUBLIC_APP_URL env and fallbacks).

tax_enabled.title: Tax Enabled
tax_enabled.description: Whether built-in tax is applied at checkout.

tax_inclusive.title: Tax Inclusive
tax_inclusive.description: When true, catalog prices are treated as tax-inclusive.

tax_rate_bps.title: Tax Rate Bps
tax_rate_bps.description: Default tax rate in basis points (800 = 8%).

shipping_mode.title: Shipping Mode
shipping_mode.description: Built-in shipping mode: flat, free, or free_over_threshold.

shipping_flat_cents.title: Shipping Flat Cents
shipping_flat_cents.description: Flat shipping amount in cents when mode is flat.

shipping_free_threshold_cents.title: Shipping Free Threshold Cents
shipping_free_threshold_cents.description: Subtotal in cents above which shipping is free (free_over_threshold mode).

SiteSettingsPublic.title: SiteSettingsPublic
SiteSettingsPublic.description: Site-wide branding exposed to the storefront SPA.

id.title: Id
id.description: Provider slug used in authorize URLs.

authorize_url.title: Authorize Url
authorize_url.description: URL that starts the OAuth flow for this provider.

SsoProviderPublic.title: SsoProviderPublic
SsoProviderPublic.description: Public SSO provider exposed to the storefront.

frontend.description: Active frontend addon and its validated configuration.

tools.description: Optional tool scripts and consent categories for storefront injection.

StorefrontConfigResponse.title: StorefrontConfigResponse
StorefrontConfigResponse.description: Merged configuration returned to the active storefront SPA.

StorefrontUnavailableResponse.title: StorefrontUnavailableResponse
StorefrontUnavailableResponse.description: Returned when no frontend addon is enabled.

scripts.title: Scripts
scripts.description: Enabled tool script descriptors (analytics, chat, consent banner, etc.).

consent_categories.title: Consent Categories
consent_categories.description: Consent categories tools may register under (placeholder until consent tool ships).

ToolsConfigPublic.title: ToolsConfigPublic
ToolsConfigPublic.description: Optional tool scripts and consent metadata for the storefront.

UserProfileUpdate.title: UserProfileUpdate
UserProfileUpdate.description: Self-service profile update (no privilege or ban fields).

push_enabled.title: Push Enabled
push_enabled.description: Whether the user has an active push subscription token saved.

password.title: Password
password.description: Plaintext password – it will be hashed server-side.

UserRegister.title: UserRegister
UserRegister.description: Public registration payload — identity plus shipping/billing addresses.

tags.name: storefront
tags.description: Public storefront bootstrap API. Used by SPAs to load site-wide branding and active frontend-addon settings. See `app/addons/frontends/README.md`.

tags.name: auth
tags.description: Customer registration, login, and JWT token refresh.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Published product catalog for the storefront.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Order lifecycle: create from cart, list, cancel, and checkout via the enabled payment addon.

tags.name: media
tags.description: Media upload and signed URL helpers (R2 or local storage).

tags.name: admin
tags.description: JSON admin API (JWT + admin role). Complements the HTML admin at `/admin`.

tags.name: addons-suppliers
tags.description: Supplier addon HTTP endpoints (e.g. Printful catalog). See `app/addons/suppliers/README.md`.

tags.name: addons-payments
tags.description: Payment addon endpoints (e.g. Stripe checkout and webhooks). Prefer `POST /api/v1/orders/{id}/checkout` for generic checkout. See `app/addons/payments/README.md`.

tags.name: addons-notifications
tags.description: Notification addon endpoints. Order emails are triggered by core commerce, not these routes. See `app/addons/notifications/README.md`.

tags.name: addons-frontends
tags.description: Optional API routes contributed by frontend addons. Static assets are served at `/`, not documented here. See `app/addons/frontends/README.md`.
